## vibe-kit additions

This block is managed by `vibe-retrofit`. Custom edits inside will be overwritten on re-run unless you move them above this marker or use `--force` (see CONTRIBUTING.md in vibe-kit).

## Commands

Run from project root:

- Install: `npm install`
- Dev server: `npm run dev`
- Typecheck: `npm run typecheck`
- Tests: `npm test`
